name: search
description: Search for charts, dashboards, notebooks, experiments, events, properties, cohorts, and other Amplitude content.

query.description: The search query to find Amplitude content

types.description: Optional list of content types to filter by (e.g., chart, dashboard, notebook, experiment)

name: get_from_url
description: Retrieve full object definitions from Amplitude URLs

url.description: The Amplitude URL to retrieve the object definition from

name: get_context
description: Obtain information about current user, organization, and accessible projects

name: get_charts
description: Retrieve full chart definitions by ID, including events, properties, and configuration.

ids.description: Array of chart IDs to retrieve

name: get_dashboard
description: Retrieve dashboards with all constituent charts

id.description: ID of the dashboard to retrieve

name: get_cohorts
description: Access cohort definitions and metadata

ids.description: Array of cohort IDs to retrieve

name: get_experiments
description: Retrieve experiment configurations and decision details

ids.description: Array of experiment IDs to retrieve

name: get_event_properties
description: Access event properties with filtering options

event_type.description: Optional event type to filter properties for

filter.description: Optional filter query for event properties

name: get_users
description: Retrieve user data from projects

user_id.description: Optional ID of a specific user to retrieve

name: get_session_replays
description: Search for session replays from the last 30 days, filtered by user properties or events.

filter.description: Filter query for session replays (by user properties or events)

limit.description: Maximum number of replays to return

name: get_notebook
description: Fetch notebook content with charts and analysis

id.description: ID of the notebook to retrieve

name: get_flags
description: Retrieve feature flag configurations

ids.description: Array of feature flag IDs to retrieve

name: query_chart
description: Execute queries on individual charts by ID

id.description: ID of the chart to query

start_date.description: Optional start date for the query range

end_date.description: Optional end date for the query range

name: query_charts
description: Run concurrent queries on up to three charts

ids.description: Array of chart IDs to query concurrently (up to 3)

start_date.description: Optional start date for the query range

end_date.description: Optional end date for the query range

name: query_dataset
description: Execute ad-hoc data queries for event segmentation, funnels, retention, and session analysis.

query.description: Query definition for the dataset analysis (event segmentation, funnels, retention, or session analysis)

start_date.description: Start date for the query range

end_date.description: End date for the query range

name: query_experiment
description: Analyze experiment performance and statistical significance

id.description: ID of the experiment to analyze

name: query_metric
description: Get data for specific metrics

id.description: ID of the metric to query

start_date.description: Optional start date for the query range

end_date.description: Optional end date for the query range

name: create_chart
description: Build new charts from query definitions

name: create_dashboard
description: Create dashboards with charts, rich text, and custom layouts.

charts.description: Optional array of chart IDs to include in the dashboard

name: create_notebook
description: Build interactive notebooks with multi-column layouts

content.description: Content definition for the notebook including charts and text blocks

name: create_experiment
description: Create A/B test experiments across one or more projects with custom variants and metrics.

variants.description: Array of variant definitions for the experiment

metrics.description: Array of metric IDs to track for the experiment

name: create_cohort
description: Build cohorts based on user properties and behaviors

definition.description: Definition of the cohort based on user properties and behaviors

name: save_chart_edits
description: Modify existing charts or save temporary edits permanently

id.description: ID of the chart to save edits for

changes.description: Changes to apply to the chart

name: get_feedback_insights
description: Retrieve processed feedback themes grouped by type: feature requests, bugs, complaints, praise, and pain points.

type.description: Optional type of feedback to filter by

name: get_feedback_comments
description: Access raw feedback with search and pagination

search.description: Optional search query for feedback comments

name: get_feedback_mentions
description: Retrieve user feedback associated with specific insights

insight_id.description: ID of the insight to retrieve mentions for

name: get_feedback_sources
description: List connected feedback integrations
